expect: task_order header and helper session lookups converge on shared session source, yielding S529 on this host with regression coverage
actual: task_order_helpers._current_session() now prefers swarm_io.session_number() and falls back to INDEX.md/git only if needed. task_order.py main uses that shared helper for the display header, and get_signal_tasks() uses the same session source for age calculations. Live verification on this host now prints '=== TASK ORDER S529 ... ==='. Regression suite tools/test_task_order_race.py passes 7/7.
diff: Expected a header-only fix; actual result consolidated all task_order session lookups onto the shared helper path. Residual repo drift remains outside task_order: other tools such as question_gen.py still reimplement session detection independently.
